# Characters

An index of notable characters in the setting.

## Eisenhorn

[[Eisenhorn|Gregor Eisenhorn]] is an Inquisitor of the Ordo Xenos. He appears in the Eisenhorn Trilogy.

## Bequin

[[Bequin|Alizebeth Bequin]] is a pariah and associate of Eisenhorn.
